info.name: REMS Portal API
info.description: Complete Postman collection mapped from CodeIgniter routes.

body.raw:
{
  "client_name": "{{client_name}}",
  "client_email": "{{client_email}}",
  "client_phone": "{{client_phone}}",
  "company": "{{client_company}}",
  "projects": [
    {
      "project_title": "Sample Project A",
      "project_description": "Interior scope for first floor",
      "category_id": {{category_id}},
      "service_ids": [{{service_id_1}}, {{service_id_2}}],
      "estimated_amount": 25000,
      "payment_type": "fixed_rate",
      "scope": "Fit-out",
      "estimate_type": "complete",
      "zip_code": "90210",
      "deadline": "standard",
      "deadline_date": "2026-05-15"
    }
  ]
}
